 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.65","title":"test(readme): rolling/expanding/ewm value assertions on small known input","description":"readme_window_operations_compiles_and_runs exercises the rolling/expanding/ewm matrix but with  patterns and shape-only asserts. The actual algebraic outputs are uncovered.

Plan: add readme_window_value_round_trip on a tiny [1, 2, 3, 4] series. Assert specific values:
- rolling(2).sum() last element = 7 (3+4)
- rolling(2).mean() last element = 3.5
- expanding.sum() final = 10
- expanding.mean() final = 2.5
- ewm with simple alpha — first value equals first input","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T18:53:15.374372031Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T19:02:36.792286707Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T19:02:36.790105936Z","close_reason":"completed: rolling/expanding/ewm value assertions on tiny input","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.65","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T18:53:15.374372031Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.7","title":"fp-io SQL table options helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table helpers that apply SqlReadOptions for table-name reads, including full-frame and chunksize variants. Reuse sql_select_all_query plus read_sql_with_options/read_sql_chunks_with_options, expose umbrella re-exports, and add focused fp-io tests for parse_dates/coerce_float table reads, chunked options, zero chunksize, and invalid table names.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:25:11.840142268Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:30:59.564593046Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:30:59.562092442Z","close_reason":"Completed in dd15e84","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.7","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:25:11.840142268Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.8","title":"fp-io SQL table options index_col helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table helpers that combine SqlReadOptions with index_col promotion for full-frame and chunksize table reads. Reuse read_sql_table_with_options/read_sql_table_chunks_with_options plus existing promotion wrappers, expose umbrella re-exports, and add focused fp-io tests for parse_dates/coerce_float with index_col, None behavior, and missing index_col validation.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:32:09.025663422Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:36:07.091767706Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:36:07.089880453Z","close_reason":"Completed in 45f7ab2","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.8","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:32:09.025663422Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.9","title":"test(readme): cover SqlInspector views/schemas/columns/indexes/FKs/UCs/PKs/reflect_table","description":"Sister to fd90.290 (which covered SqlInspector::tables only).

README line 148 documents SqlInspector as a SQLAlchemy.Inspector-shaped introspection (tables / views / schemas / columns / indexes / FKs / UCs / reflect_table / reflect_all_tables).

Currently only tables(schema) has integration coverage in readme_quick_example.rs (added by fd90.290). The other 8 documented methods are uncovered:
- views(schema)
- schemas()
- columns(table, schema)
- indexes(table, schema)
- foreign_keys(table, schema)
- unique_constraints(table, schema)
- primary_key_columns(table, schema)
- reflect_table(table, schema)

Plan: extend readme_quick_start_round_trip_through_sqlite (or sibling) to call each method against a small inspector-friendly schema and assert results match the schema.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:27:25.443018956Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T11:32:29.891910564Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T11:32:29.889312994Z","close_reason":"completed: 8 SqlInspector methods covered by readme_quick_start_round_trip_through_sqlite (commit 2d7d994)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.9","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:27:25.443018956Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
